data.name: Cerulean Invasion: Aftermath
data.detailed_description:
In the wake of Cerulean Invasion, our characters must confront what happened, reflect on the bonds they’ve built, and learn how to navigate life afterward.

SYNOPSIS

In Cerulean Invasion: Aftermath, an 18+ visual novel, experience the story through three distinct perspectives: Osman, Evan, and Alexis. Witness their personal growth as they move forward in different ways. Some form new connections, others deepen existing bonds, and some must confront the consequences left behind by the events of Cerulean Invasion.

GAME FEATURES

  • Engaging Story: ≈33k words (approx. 2 hours of play)

  • Pleasure Room (see Extras)

  • Stunning Original Artwork: Sprite and CG art by Zinq

  • Detailed CGs: 15 CGs (not counting variations)

  • 18+ Scenes 

  • In-Game Achievements

  • And so much more!
